title: Direct Flash Window Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Direct Flash Window Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Raw DSLR direct-flash night-window portrait built around adult woman in her mid-20s with platinum blonde hair in a long braid over one shoulder, sculpted oval face, blue-green almond eyes, and mauve-pink lips, cropped hot pink hoodie, high-waisted light blue distressed denim shorts, and small stud earrings, and a single red rose. Subject: adult woman in her mid-20s with platinum blonde hair in a long braid over one shoulder, sculpted oval face, blue-green almond eyes, and mauve-pink lips is the adult portrait subject with sculpted facial detail, captivating gaze, visible braid, natural skin texture, and cool romantic confidence. Scene: dark indoor night window frame with faint city lights bokeh outside anchors the image as a dark indoor night portrait with city-light bokeh outside the window and hard flash separation from the background. Composition: leaning back against the dark window frame, one arm raised high, one hand holding a single red rose near her face, soft direct gaze; fixed three-quarter portrait from a slightly low angle, face and rose sharp, dark window frame as graphic structure, and tight 4:5 editorial crop. Signature Elements: cropped hot pink hoodie, high-waisted light blue distressed denim shorts, and small stud earrings and the red rose near the face create the template identity while the direct flash, night window, and slightly low-angle crop stay fixed. Style: Raw DSLR flash photography with visible film grain, vibrant color, cool-girl romantic playfulness, high contrast shadows, and fashion-editorial realism. Color Palette: Fixed hot pink hoodie, light blue denim, red rose, mauve-pink lips, cool dark window tones, blue-green eye accents, and night-city bokeh highlights. Lighting: Direct on-camera flash with hard contrast, crisp facial detail, shadows cast behind the subject, saturated color, and controlled specular highlights on eyes and rose petals. Camera: Three-quarter shot from slightly low angle, sharp focus on face and rose, raw DSLR texture, 4:5 aspect ratio, and shallow background separation. Materials: Cotton hoodie, distressed denim, rose petals, glass window, small stud earrings, hair braid texture, and film grain remain tactile and believable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Camera: Three-quarter shot from slightly low angle, sharp focus on face and rose, raw DSLR texture, 4:5 aspect ratio, and shallow background separation. Materials: Cotton hoodie, distressed denim, rose petals, glass window, small stud earrings, hair braid texture, and film grain remain tactile and believable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
